summary: Frontend-only E2E testing of SRS Agency milk billing Expo app via web preview (mobile viewport 390x844). All 12 requested flows passed including home validation, navigation, dynamic items, auto-calc amount, running total, bill preview matching SRS AGENCIES PDF layout (header, address, brands VIJAYA/JERSEY/HERITAGE/NANDINI, phone 9949384526, FROM/TO, table headers S.No./Particulars/Qty./Rate/Amount, TOTAL row, For SRS Agencies + Signature line), Save with 'Bill saved' toast, Share & Print did not crash, Saved Bills list view/open/delete all working.

issues: Console warning: 'shadow*' style props deprecated, use 'boxShadow' (paper card style)
Console warning: TouchableWithoutFeedback deprecated, use Pressable for keyboard dismiss

action_items: (Optional) Replace deprecated TouchableWithoutFeedback in app/index.tsx with Pressable for keyboard dismissal
(Optional) Migrate shadow* style props in bill-preview.tsx paper style to boxShadow to silence RN web warnings
critical_code_review_comments: All interactive elements have proper testID attributes — excellent.
calcAmount/calcTotal correctly handle empty/NaN inputs via parseFloat fallback.
saveBill upserts by id, so re-saving an opened saved bill won't duplicate — good.
onGenerate silently no-ops when no valid items exist; consider showing a toast/error so users understand why nothing happens.

Bill date defaults to 'now' on every preview render (when no params.billDate). When reopening a saved bill, params.billDate is passed so this is fine, but the savedAt updates on every save click — acceptable.
seed_data_creation: Created one bill 'TEST_Dr Girish' (January 30x50=1500, February 10x25=250, total 1750) during testing and deleted it at the end. AsyncStorage left empty.
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is fully functional on web preview. expo-print/expo-sharing don't actually open native dialogs on web but do NOT crash — code already handles via try/catch + isAvailableAsync. DateTimePicker did not need to be opened; default 'today' dates were used and preview rendered correctly.
rca_of_issue: No bugs found. All requested flows verified end-to-end.
